hero.title: Preserve Your Family Legacy Forever
hero.subtitle: Build your digital family tree, track your Gotra and Kul heritage, and share your history with generations to come. The only family tree app built specifically for the Indian culture.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your family's needs.

free.name: Free
free.desc: Perfect for individuals just starting out.

heritage.title: Deeply Rooted in Indian Heritage
heritage.subtitle: Traditional tools don't understand our culture. We built Vanshavali with features that actually matter to Indian families.

feat1.title: Gotra & Kul Tracking
feat1.desc: Preserve your lineage according to your community's traditions (Rajput, Brahmin, Jain, etc).

feat2.title: Native Village (Mool)
feat2.desc: Never lose connection to your ancestral village and roots in Bharat.

feat3.title: Joint Family Support
feat3.desc: Visualize complex joint family structures with ease, from patriarchs to the newest branch.

features.title: Powerful Tools for Your Family History
features.subtitle: Vanshavali provides a sophisticated canvas where you can map relationships, upload old photos, and record the stories of your ancestors. It's more than a tree; it's a living archive.

card1.title: Private & Secure
card1.desc: Your data is yours. Choose who sees your family secrets.

card2.title: Share via WhatsApp
card2.desc: Invite relatives to add their branches with one click.

card3.title: High-Res Exports
card3.desc: Download your tree as a beautiful PDF to print and frame.

card4.title: Real-time Editing
card4.desc: Collaborate with siblings and parents to build the full picture.

security.title: Your Family Secrets are Safe with Us

item1.title: No Data Selling
item1.desc: Unlike social media, we never sell your family's data or photos to advertisers.

item2.title: Private by Default
item2.desc: Your tree is only visible to you and the relatives you explicitly invite.

item3.title: Encrypted Storage
item3.desc: All your photos and records are stored with enterprise-grade encryption.

q1.q: Is it really free for 2 generations?
q1.a: Yes, you can build a complete tree with up to 2 generations without paying a single rupee. No credit card required.

q2.q: Can I download my tree to print?
q2.a: Absolutely! The Family Plan allows you to export high-resolution PDFs and images ready for professional framing.

q3.q: How do I invite my relatives?
q3.a: Just click 'Invite' on your tree page to get a special WhatsApp link. Anyone with the link can join and contribute.

q4.q: Is my data safe if I delete my account?
q4.a: Yes, we respect your privacy. When you delete your account, all your data, relationships, and photos are permanently erased.

q5.q: Can I use it in Hindi or other languages?
q5.a: Yes! Our entire interface is available in 9 languages including Hindi, Sanskrit, Tamil, and more.

blog.title: Family History Resources
blog.subtitle: Learn how to trace your roots and preserve your family stories with our expert guides.

post1.title: How to Trace Your Gotra
post1.desc: A beginner's guide to understanding your lineage and finding your ancestral roots in Bharat.

post2.title: Digitizing Old Family Photos
post2.desc: Learn the best ways to scan and preserve your grandfather's precious old photographs.

post3.title: The Magic of Joint Families
post3.desc: Why building a family tree is the best way to keep your cousins and relatives connected.

cta.title: Start Preserving Your Family History Today
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Indian families who are digitizing their lineage. It's free to start and takes less than a minute.
